content.rendered: The OCP Global Summit is the premier event uniting the most forward-thinking minds in open IT Ecosystem development. The 2025 edition of the Summit takes place in San Jose, California from October 13-16 and presents a unique platform for the global open compute community to share their insights, foster partnerships and showcase cutting-edge advancements in open hardware and software. AMI will join the Summit as an Emerald Sponsor.
